description: The Aizukotetsu-kai is a yakuza organization based in Kyoto, Japan, founded in 1868 by Senkichi Kousaka. It was one of the first syndicates named under Japan's anti-boryokudan legislation in 1992. At its peak in 1993, it had 1,600 members, but current membership is around 40. In 2005, it allied with the Sixth Yamaguchi-gumi.
